strengths: Schema changes are strictly additive and idempotent: columns.tools (TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', agent-schema.sql:40) and columns.tool_budget (INTEGER, nullable, agent-schema.sql:41) use ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS; agent_tool_calls uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS with its index (agent-schema.sql:43-58). No destructive statements (no DROP/TRUNCATE/DELETE/ALTER COLUMN TYPE).
agent_tool_calls shape matches spec R5 exactly (board_id FK with ON DELETE CASCADE, column_slug, tool_name, input JSONB, result, error_code, attempt, created_at).

TemplateColumn interface extended additively with optional tools?: string[] and tool_budget?: number (templates.ts:16-17); web_search assigned only to the research-specialist DATA, keeping schema/columns template-agnostic.
Tests written and passing (17/17), deep-equality on research-specialist.tools == ['web_search'] and ?? [] normalization for non-research columns; descriptive test names.

Persistence wiring correctly deferred to T6: git diff --stat confirms the SHA range touches only the 3 in-scope files; insertColumns in routes.ts:86-102 still omits tools/tool_budget, so no premature wiring was added.
